name: loki-activity-bridge
description: LOKI Activity bridge for Discord Activity rooms, OBS controls, and Twitch metadata.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c auto "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p client/tsconfig.json && cd client && node ../node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build && cd .. && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p server/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p client/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:rooms: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run test:rooms
